dataset_implications.details: Overweight bare and quoted tautologies, SQL comments, SLEEP/pg_sleep/WAITFOR, information_schema/sqlite_master/pg_catalog, and stacked queries.
Keep normal guard examples focused on benign SQL searches and single auth failures.
Preserve threshold ownership with repeated failures, short windows, and spray cues.
Keep true traversal/file-read tokens clearly separate from SQL comment syntax.
Use only clear service/host enumeration cues as a small recall guard.

next_step: Create the v4.1 SQLi-boundary supplement on top of the v4 train split, then train from the base LFM2-350M model and run hard-contrast probes before any mini semantic eval.

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Single or isolated failed-auth events still look too much like threshold-based attacks.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add normal auth negatives with failed_attempts=1, count=1, correlation=none, lockout=false, and no short burst window.
bucket_summary.title: Normal -> brute force

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Schema-discovery SQLi can be mistaken for ordinary documentation or search traffic.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add SQLi positives for information_schema, sqlite_master, pg_catalog, blocked status, and database-backed routes, paired with benign SQL documentation searches.
bucket_summary.title: SQLi -> normal

bucket_summary.diagnosis: Time-delay/API error SQLi can drift into generic reconnaissance.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add SLEEP, pg_sleep, WAITFOR, and upstream latency SQLi positives without port/host enumeration cues.
bucket_summary.title: SQLi -> port/recon

bucket_summary.diagnosis: SQL quote/comment boundaries are still confused with file-read or traversal signals.
bucket_summary.suggested_repair_pattern: Add close SQLi-vs-traversal contrasts: SQL comments, quotes, tautologies, stacked queries, and schema names versus ../, /etc/passwd, win.ini, .env, and wrappers.
bucket_summary.title: SQLi -> traversal

summary: v4.1 slices the v4 hard-contrast failures at temp 0 and temp 0.3 so the next repair can focus narrowly on SQLi boundaries, especially SQLi mistaken for traversal, without using the fixed test split.
